title: Big Horse Stable
description: Adds a Big Horse Stable to the plains and forest biome
body:
This Minecraft mod adds a large horse stable structure to the game.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70d4fde9f2c6630cbbffb41a093bed1d0a7cc2fb.jpeg)


Inside, you’ll find horses, donkeys, and mules, along with chests filled with loot to help you gear up.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c0e1c83b509e20de02f002cb06b675cf0f688b4.jpeg)

The loot includes saddles, leads and treats to bond with your new companions.

![Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d369d72b7a1661b5c534d09d281d4fb6888d8c7.jpeg)


The stable spawns in normal plains and forest biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
